betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Elemental Materials§f

§aHarvest elemental essences from mobs and craft powerful dusts!§f

Three elemental mobs spawn at §elight ≤8§f in specific biomes. Each drops rods craftable into powder.

§6Elemental Mobs§f:
§b• Blizz§f — Cold biomes. Drops §bBlizz Rods§f. Attacks inflict §eSlowness II (5s)§f.
§b• Blitz§f — Hot/dry biomes. Drops §bBlitz Rods§f. Attacks inflict §eBlindness§f.
§b• Basalz§f — Rocky/mountain biomes. Drops §bBasalz Rods§f. Attacks inflict §eWeakness§f.

§6Rod Processing§f:
§9Craft§f: 1 Rod → §e2§f Powder (shapeless)
§9Pulverizer§f: 1 Rod → §e4§f Powder (Blizz: §e50%§f Snowball bonus)

§6Elemental Dusts (shapeless, yields 2)§f:
§b• Pyrotheum§f — Blaze Powder + Redstone + Sulfur. Smelts ore→ingot (shapeless). Melts to §bBlazing Pyrotheum§f.
§b• Cryotheum§f — Blizz Powder + Redstone + Snowball. Melts to §bGelid Cryotheum§f.
§b• Aerotheum§f — Blitz Powder + Redstone + Niter. Melts to §bZephyrean Aerotheum§f.
§b• Petrotheum§f — Basalz Powder + Redstone + Bitumen. Breaks ore→§e2x§f dust (shapeless). Melts to §bTectonic Petrotheum§f.

§eTip§f: Pyrotheum and Petrotheum work shapeless in the crafting grid — no machine needed.
